name: io.devicechain.sdk
description: The Unity client plugin for the DeviceChain platform — a digital-twin enabler built on the AOT/IL2CPP-safe C# SDK. Authenticate, query, subscribe to live telemetry, and emit device-plane telemetry as an untrusted external client, in the Editor, standalone players, and WebGL.

samples.description: A runtime-spawned rotating cube that proves the package loads and the render loop runs — the slice-4 acceptance smoke test. Needs no backend.
